summary_text: **Contract checks** - `single-writer` は必須です。`phase_artifacts` の compact 更新は workflow 側 single-writer のみ許容、producer script は path emit のみ許容です。直接 compact 更新する markdown layer は違反です（[requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:112](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:112), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:166](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:166), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:237](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:237)）。 - `bounded compact artifact` は必須です。`phase_artifacts` は path string only、本文/要約本文/reasoning の inline 混入は禁止です。markdown-first layer は「本文を外部 md に置き、compact には参照のみ」でないと違反です（[requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:107](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:107), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:114](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:114), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:227](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:227)）。 - `explicit-start` は必須です。実行開始シグナルは `/vote`・explicit `tutti`・`workflow_dispatch` のみで、issue 作成や自然言語入力だけで knowledge layer が実行経路を起動する設計は違反です（[workflow-ownership.md:11](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/workflow-ownership.md:11), [workflow-ownership.md:13](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/workflow-ownership.md:13)）。 - `kernel_run_id` は明示 input のみ有効です。推測/mint/rewrite は禁止、未伝播時は no-op で新規 compact 生成禁止です（[requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:111](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:111), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:113](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:113), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:149](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:149), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:205](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:205)）。 **Likely blockers** - 現行 `kernel-compact-artifact.sh` は `phase_artifacts/context_reference` を merge する汎用面なので、knowledge layer 側が本文や非path値を流し込むと契約違反を技術的に起こせます。契約準拠は workflow/テスト運用依存が強いです（[kernel-compact-artifact.sh:412](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:412), [kernel-compact-artifact.sh:462](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:462), [kernel-compact-artifact.sh:714](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:714)）。 - knowledge layer が「収集スクリプトから compact へ直接書く」設計だと single-writer に即衝突します。workflow propagation step 経由へ限定する必要があります（[requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:237](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:237)）。 - knowledge layer がバックグラウンドで自動 ingestion し、実行開始や run 更新を暗黙起動する設計は start-signal 契約と no-op 契約に衝突します（[workflow-ownership.md:13](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/workflow-ownership.md:13), [requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:205](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:205)）。
